ddls:
CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise the character belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the character was last updated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species or type of the character */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin or place of creation of the character */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the character (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the franchise */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the franchise was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the franchise was last updated */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the creator or company that created the franchise */,
  "parent_company" TEXT /* Name of the parent company, if any */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Official website of the franchise */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the franchise's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who likes the item */,
  "like_name" TEXT /* Name of the like */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the like */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the like */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was recorded */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity or level of the like */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the like */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_likes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_likes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_dislikes" (
  "dislike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dislike */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character who dislikes the item */,
  "dislike_name" TEXT /* Name of the dislike */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the dislike */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dislike */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the dislike was recorded */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity or level of the dislike */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the dislike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dislike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_dislikes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_dislikes_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the category is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_media_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media appearance */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character appearing in the media */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media item */,
  "appearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the appearance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the appearance */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the character in the media */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the appearance */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_media_appearances_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_items ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_media_appearances_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_items" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the media item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the media (e.g., game, movie, book) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the media item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the media item was last updated */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Name of the producer or director */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the media item */,
  "runtime" TEXT /* Runtime of the media item */,
  "box_office" TEXT /* Box office revenue if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "character_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first character in the interaction */,
  "character_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second character in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., friendship, rivalry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the interaction was recorded */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity or level of the interaction */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the interaction */,
  "last_occurred" TEXT /* Date of the last interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_interactions_character_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_2") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_interactions_character_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("character_id_1") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., birth, major achievement) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event occurred */,
  "participants" TEXT /* Other characters involved in the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_history_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trait */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the trait was recorded */,
  "intensity" TEXT /* Intensity or level of the trait */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the trait */,
  "inherited" INTEGER /* Whether the trait is inherited from another character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_traits_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the character profile */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for creating the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_versions_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image */,
  "is_main_image" INTEGER /* Whether the image is the main image for the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_images_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "video_size" REAL /* Size of the video in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* File path to the video thumbnail */,
  "is_main_video" INTEGER /* Whether the video is the main video for the character */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_videos_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "character_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* ID of the character */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the document in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., profile, background) */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Whether the document is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_character_documents_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id")
)
